All right at 330 days we're right there at the end of 12 months you're gonna ask for a testimonial request that's right you haven't sold them you haven't made a deal yet they're still a prospect they're still a lead in your cycle and you're gonna ask for them to give you a testimony you could do this handwritten handwritten note could you please send me back a testimony I don't like that idea you could send an email I don't particularly like that idea much either I do like this better okay either a phone call or a personal visit and say hey could you give and give me a testimony of my company my service how consistent persistent how professional I am I would really appreciate that when asking for testimonies do not wait get it now okay many people will not give you a testimony right now just because they're gonna be like I'll give it to you later don't trust that say what would you say about me I'll write it up and send it back to you it's a testimonial request it's done at 330 days this is gonna make a difference I'll see you in about 35 days right there to do the one-year call in case this doesn't work
